headerDisplay: Control a gate or garage door via Raspberry Pi GPIO.
footerDisplay: For documentation, see the [plugin homepage](https://github.com/roberto-montanari/homebridge-gpio-gate-door-controller) on GitHub.

name.title: Garage door or gate name
name.description: Name of the garage door or the automatic gate

doorSwitchPin.title: Relay GPIO pin
doorSwitchPin.description: Physical GPIO pin controlling the relay

doorSwitchPressTimeInMs.title: Relay pulse duration (ms)
doorSwitchPressTimeInMs.description: How long the relay stays active to simulate button press

doorSwitchValue.title: Relay active logic
doorSwitchValue.description: Set to ACTIVE LOW if your relay triggers at 0V

closedDoorSensorPin.title: Closed sensor GPIO pin
closedDoorSensorPin.description: GPIO pin that detects if the gate is closed (optional)

closedDoorSensorValue.title: Closed sensor logic
closedDoorSensorValue.description: Signal value when the gate is detected as closed

openDoorSensorPin.title: Open sensor GPIO pin
openDoorSensorPin.description: GPIO pin that detects if the gate is open (optional)

openDoorSensorValue.title: Open sensor logic
openDoorSensorValue.description: Signal value when the gate is detected as open

doorPollInMs.title: Sensor polling interval (ms)
doorPollInMs.description: How often to check sensor state

doorOpensInSeconds.title: Door travel time (seconds)
doorOpensInSeconds.description: Time required for full open or close cycle (set slightly higher than actual time)
